title: ‘We’re not concerned about Boston’: Pistons’ head coach referenced Celtics amid four-game losing streak
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Detroit Pistons head coach J.B. Bickerstaff comments on not being concerned about the Boston Celtics amid losing streak.
Pistons' Eastern Conference lead shrinks to 2.5 games over Celtics during Detroit's current four-game losing streak.
Celtics gain momentum with Jayson Tatum's return; Pistons aim to end skid against Nets on Tuesday.

title: Boston’s Patricia Cornwell sees her books land on screen with ‘Scarpetta’
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: Patricia Cornwell's Kay Scarpetta series is adapted into a Prime Video series starring Nicole Kidman and Jamie Lee Curtis.
Cornwell has a cameo role as a judge in the series, which blends her books 'Postmortem' and 'Autopsy'.
Cornwell's memoir 'True Crime' releases May 2, recounting her life challenges and literary journey.

title: Patriots free agency live updates: Tracking New England’s top offseason pickups
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: New England Patriots free agency begins Monday with over $55 million in cap space for roster upgrades.
Patriots have cut Stefon Diggs and traded center Garrett Bradbury, creating cap room for offseason moves.
Patriots linked with free agents Boye Mafe, Alec Pierce, and exploring potential trade for Brian Thomas Jr.

title: Boston Marathon runner aims to complete marathons in all 50 states
author: Kelly Chan
bullets: Zara Harding aims to complete marathons in all 50 states, with 10 states left after Boston.
Harding, 46, from Henderson, Nevada, resumed marathon running after recovering from colorectal cancer treatments.
Running for Dana-Farber's Marathon Challenge Team, Harding is raising $12,000 for cancer research.

title: Judge dismisses lawsuit of Babson College student mistakenly deported to Honduras
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Judge Richard Stearns dismissed Any Lucia Lopez Belloza's habeas lawsuit, citing her refusal to board a flight back to the U.S.
Lopez Belloza, a Babson College student, was mistakenly deported to Honduras from Logan Airport despite a court order.
Her lawyer alleges ICE used tactics to obscure detainee locations, complicating habeas filings and impeding legal processes.

title: NBA coach dubs Derrick White as a ‘top-5 player’ in NBA
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Cavaliers coach Kenny Atkinson ranks Celtics' Derrick White among NBA's top five players based on advanced statistics.
Derrick White averages 17.4 points, 4.4 rebounds, and 5.7 assists this season, with a 39.4% field goal percentage.
Jayson Tatum returned from injury, allowing White to resume his versatile role in the Celtics' lineup.

title: Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum dynamic shines in Celtics win over Cavaliers: 7 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Jaylen Brown scored 23 points, leading the Boston Celtics to a 109-98 win over the Cleveland Cavaliers.
Jayson Tatum, still recovering, contributed 20 points in 27 minutes in only his second game back from injury.
Celtics' defense was crucial, forcing Cavaliers into poor shooting, particularly in the second quarter.

title: North Kingstown, R.I. police officer dies by suicide, department says
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: North Kingstown Police officer Brittany Dougal, 29, died by suicide on March 4 after battling mental illness.
Dougal, a recent graduate of the Rhode Island Municipal Police Training Academy, was sworn in as an officer in December.
Dougal's funeral arrangements include visitation in Danvers, Massachusetts, with donations suggested to local charities in her memory.

title: 9 under-the-radar players for Patriots to consider in free agency
author: Conor Roche
bullets: The New England Patriots are considering nine under-the-radar players in the upcoming NFL free agency period.
Vikings' receiver Jalen Nailor and Giants' tight end Daniel Bellinger are potential targets for roster depth.
Patriots have a budget of $60 million, allowing for strategic signings beyond high-profile free agents.

title: Did Tom Brady prevent Patriots from acquiring Maxx Crosby? One report suggests possibility.
author: Conor Roche
bullets: Tom Brady, Raiders minority owner, reportedly influenced a decision against trading Maxx Crosby to the Patriots.
The Raiders traded Maxx Crosby to the Ravens for two first-round picks, including the 14th overall pick in 2026.
Patriots are exploring the free-agent market for an edge rusher, linked to Jaelan Phillips and Boye Mafe.
